title: werauhia vittata
intro: Werauhia vittata, also known as the 'hanging sword fern', is a species of plant in the Aspleniaceae family, native to New Zealand. It is often used in traditional Maori medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Werauhia vittata include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, making it a popular choice for topical applications. Herbal preparations of Werauhia vittata can be made into teas, infusions, and poultices, which are often used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and minor injuries.
